diff --git a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
index 6293cbd..bba966c 100644
--- a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
+++ b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
@@ -120,4 +120,4 @@ class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
             executor = executor._old_executor
 
         # Return the future
-        return f
+        return f
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..8da83f2 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -297,7 +297,8 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                 try:
                     raise exc_info[1]
                 except BaseException:
-                    result = await awaitable
+                    pass
+                result = await awaitable
             else:
                 result = await awaitable
         except BaseException as e:
@@ -305,11 +306,10 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         else:
             call_result.set_result(result)
         finally:
-            if current_task is not None and task_context is not None:
+            if current_task is not None or task_context is not None:
                 task_context.remove(current_task)
             context[0] = contextvars.copy_context()
 
-
 class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
     Utility class which turns a synchronous callable into an awaitable that
